[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1101100011 6
1 0010001101 4
2 1011100101 6
3 0111011111 8
4 0010101011 5
5 1110111110 8
6 1101100011 6
7 0010001101 4

70 07 0001010100 3

71 17 0111011111 8 match 3
